title: Replay Overview Coverage Remediation — Show All Known Strategies Without Backfill
type: implementation (modifies existing read-only overview endpoint + UI) + targeted tests + artifact

problem.summary: The History Replay Overview (GET /api/replay/history-overview, P259A) walked ONLY the strategy registry and defaulted to bet_index=1, so it could not surface every known strategy.
root_gaps: registry-only walk: DB orphan strategies (replay rows but unregistered) never appear
registry/lottery mismatch: rows under a lottery_type not in registry supported_lottery_types never appear
default bet_index=1 hides all multi-bet strategies (only 13 of 38 reachable strategies visible by default)

solution.approach: Opt-in coverage_mode query param (default false). Legacy P259A behaviour is byte-for-byte preserved; coverage_mode=true expands the cell universe to UNION(registry-supported cells, DB cells) and annotates every row with coverage metadata. Frontend overview now defaults to coverage_mode=true&bet_index=0.
solution.can_open_detail_rule: can_open_detail == has_replay_rows (the P259B/P261A detail endpoints scope purely by lottery_type+strategy_id and return rows whenever they exist, including for orphans)

before.registered_without_rows_flagged: implicitly present but no reason annotation
before.note: default bet_index=1 only; multi-bet hidden; orphans/mismatch unreachable

files_changed.lottery_api/routes/replay.py: added coverage helpers (_parse_bet_indices_csv, _coverage_missing_reason, _build_overview_row) + coverage_mode param + DB query columns (distinct_draw_count, max_bet_index, GROUP_CONCAT bet_index, db strategy_name) + registry walk / coverage-universe expansion + coverage_summary
files_changed.index.html: P259A overview: 4 new coverage columns (registry status / distinct draws / available bet indices / missing reason), registry-status + reason badges, summary coverage counts, JS fetches coverage_mode=true and defaults to bet_index=0; P261A detail expand untouched

validation.regression: P262A 14, P261A 50, P260C 29, P259C 33, P259B 38, P259A 46 — all PASS (239 total across suites)
validation.read_only_proof: strategy_prediction_replays row count identical before/after coverage calls; registry size unchanged (38); no DB write; no backfill; no adapter/registry mutation
validation.browser_e2e: NOT RUN locally (running backend is stale pre-P262B; not disturbed). Covered by CI replay-browser-e2e-validation; behaviours verified at API (TestClient) + DOM-construction level.
